T0368.title: Table Banker
T0368.definition: 在赌博黑产中，“掌档”指牌桌上直接经手赌资收付、按输赢结果分发现金的操盘手。
T0368.description: The table manager is the terminal executor of cash flow for each round, responsible for counting money, taking the house's cut, and paying out winnings, ensuring instant settlement between gamblers and the house. They are usually deeply trusted by the boss and control the on-site cash pool, making them a potential vulnerability for internal theft or betrayal. In online gambling, this role is replaced by automated settlement systems, but offline operations still rely on them to maintain table order and the closed financial loop.
